meta.description: A strict venue-first paper-sharing hub for ophthalmic AI across foundation models, visual grounding, PEFT, and hyperbolic methods.

papers.title: A foundation model for generalizable disease detection from retinal images
papers.summary: RETFound is the anchor ophthalmic foundation model paper of the last five years, emphasizing large-scale pretraining for transfer across retinal tasks.
papers.notes: Nature article retained under the strict venue whitelist. Public figure stays placeholder until a clean paper-native architecture diagram can be promoted. Public figure currently uses a rendered paper page containing the architecture/overview figure.

papers.title: A Foundation Language-Image Model of the Retina (FLAIR): encoding expert knowledge in text supervision
papers.summary: Vision-language foundation model for fundus imaging trained with expert text supervision; demonstrates strong zero-/few-shot transfer and domain robustness.
papers.notes: Ophthalmic foundation-model paper from Medical Image Analysis. Keep as a core whitelist-compliant entry for both foundation-model and grounding tracks.

papers.title: Metadata-enhanced contrastive learning from retinal optical coherence tomography images
papers.summary: Uses patient/time/eye metadata to form better positives for contrastive pretraining on 170k+ OCT images; outperforms standard CL and a retinal foundation model on AMD-related tasks.
papers.notes: Whitelist-compliant ophthalmic Medical Image Analysis paper on OCT pretraining with metadata-aware contrastive positives.

papers.title: LViT: Language Meets Vision Transformer in Medical Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Integrates language cues into vision transformers for medical segmentation; included as medically-close grounding reference when ophthalmic-specific grounding is sparse.
papers.notes: Medically close TMI paper retained because whitelist-compliant ophthalmic grounding papers remain sparse.

papers.title: 3DSAM-adapter: Holistic adaptation of SAM from 2D to 3D for promptable tumor segmentation
papers.summary: Parameter-efficient adapters to adapt Segment Anything from 2D natural images to 3D medical volumes while reusing most pretrained weights.
papers.notes: Medically close Medical Image Analysis PEFT reference retained under the whitelist while ophthalmic venue-listed adapter papers remain sparse.

papers.title: SPA: Leveraging the SAM With Spatial Priors Adapter for Enhanced Medical Image Segmentation
papers.venue: IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
papers.summary: Introduces a spatial-prior adapter to adapt SAM efficiently for medical segmentation tasks, illustrating parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategies.
papers.notes: Medically close JBHI PEFT paper retained under the whitelist as a current adapter reference.

papers.title: A Hyperbolic-to-Hyperbolic Graph Convolutional Network
papers.summary: Defines manifold-preserving hyperbolic graph convolution operating directly on hyperbolic manifolds, avoiding tangent-space distortion.
papers.notes: General-method hyperbolic paper from an allowed top vision venue; retained under the hyperbolic exception. Public figure currently uses a rendered paper page containing the architecture/overview figure.

papers.title: Hyperbolic Space with Hierarchical Margin Boosts Fine-Grained Learning from Coarse Labels
papers.summary: Uses hyperbolic embeddings with hierarchical cosine margins to improve coarse-to-fine generalization.
papers.notes: General-method NeurIPS paper retained under the hyperbolic exception. Public figure currently uses a rendered paper page containing the architecture/overview figure.

papers.title: Hyperbolic Graph Neural Networks at Scale: A Meta Learning Approach
papers.summary: Meta-learning approach enabling scalable hyperbolic GNNs for node classification/link prediction with few-shot transfer.
papers.notes: General-method NeurIPS paper retained under the hyperbolic exception. Public figure currently uses a rendered paper page containing the architecture/overview figure.

papers.title: Hyperbolic VAE via Latent Gaussian Distributions
papers.summary: Variational autoencoder whose latent space is a Gaussian-manifold hyperbolic space; shows stability and strong performance.
papers.notes: General-method NeurIPS paper retained under the hyperbolic exception. Public figure currently uses a rendered paper page containing the architecture/overview figure.

papers.title: Coneheads: Hierarchy Aware Attention
papers.summary: Replaces dot-product attention with hierarchy-aware hyperbolic cone attention; improves performance with fewer parameters.
papers.notes: General-method NeurIPS paper retained under the hyperbolic exception. Public figure currently uses a rendered paper page containing the architecture/overview figure.
